items.headline: Two Rockies prospects make Team of the Week

news_items.headline: O'Hearn drives in 10, breaking Pirates' record
news_items.summary: Pittsburgh Pirates first baseman Ryan O'Hearn, in his first season with the franchise, made history Tuesday night, setting a club record by driving in 10 runs on three home runs in a convincing 12-4 victory over the Atlanta Braves at PNC Park.

news_items.headline: 3B coach Cora leaves Tigers during third season
news_items.summary: Detroit Tigers third base coach Joey Cora, the older brother of former Boston Red Sox manager Alex Cora, has left the club in the middle of his third season on the job because of what manager A.J. Hinch described on Tuesday as "philosophical differences."

news_items.headline: Contreras, Ashcraft among ASG replacements list
news_items.summary: Willson Contreras headlines list of players selected as All-Star Game replacements.

news_items.headline: Yankees make history, strike out 17 times again
news_items.summary: In a 6-4 loss to the Rays on Tuesday night, the Yankees whiffed 17 times to become the first team in American League history to hit that mark in consecutive nine-inning games.

news_items.headline: Royals' Tolbert (12 ABs, 12 hits) ties MLB record
news_items.summary: Tyler Tolbert of the Royals tied a major league record with hits in 12 consecutive plate appearances, reaching the mark with an infield single in a 16-12 win over the Mets on Tuesday night.

news_items.headline: Ohtani shrugs off arm issue, to make Friday start
news_items.summary: Shohei Ohtani, having fully recovered from the biceps injury that forced him to exit a recent game early, is lined up to pitch Friday.

news_items.headline: Goodman scratched before Rockies take on Dodgers
news_items.summary: Colorado Rockies All-Star Hunter Goodman, originally slotted to be the team's designated hitter, was scratched from the lineup against the Los Angeles Dodgers on Tuesday night, a day after he suffered a left hand contusion in an 8-7, 11-inning loss.

news_items.headline: ⚾ Breaking down the MLB Home Run Derby field
news_items.summary: The sluggers who will be swinging for the fences in Philly are being named. Here's how they match up.

news_items.headline: Mets feel squeeze of short pitching staff in loss to Royals: 'It was a tough day for us'
news_items.summary: After two games in Atlanta that required the use of a lot of pitchers, the Mets bullpen was short in Tuesday's game against the Royals and it showed.

news_items.summary: Munetaka Murakami returns to Charlotte amid uneven farm slate

news_items.headline: Payton Tolle propels the Red Sox out of last place with an excellent outing in Chicago
news_items.summary: With tonight’s win, the Red Sox also move to .500 with Chad Tracy at the helm.

news_items.headline: Seymour, bottom of the lineup lead the way: Rays 6, Yankees 4
news_items.summary: Coming off three consecutive losses, the Tampa Bay Rays were needing to bounce back against the Yankees on Tuesday night and they did just that behind a stellar performance by Ian Seymour and production from the bottom of the lineup. Having dropped game one of the four game set on Monday night, the Rays sent […]

news_items.headline: Fair or foul? White Sox drop series opener to Red Sox, 8-1
news_items.summary: Boston shut down the Chicago offense while Noah Schultz struggled through five innings and the South Side bullpen faltered

news_items.headline: Cubs Minor League Wrap: Josiah Hartshorn gets back on track in South Bend win
news_items.summary: The Pelicans win on a walk-off grand slam. South Bend wins in extras. Two Smokies win honors.

Imai only lasted 3.2 IP, impacted by a cut on the ring fighter of […]
